statement: In every magma, Equation 1185 (`x = y * ((z * (z * y)) * y)`) implies Equation 796 (`x = y * (z * ((w * y) * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0028
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op z y)) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op w y) x)))
